name: Tuna, Lemon and Caper
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian Tuna in Oil, Drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tuna, olive oil, capers, parsley, garlic, lemon peel, salt and pepper in a bowl.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Gradually add pasta water while tossing with cooked corkscrew pasta until well combined.
